sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Nasus Pharma to Participate in Upcoming Investor Conferences
feed.summary: Nasus Pharma, a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company, announced its participation in two upcoming investor conferences in May 2026. CFO Eyal Rubin will attend the "Market Movers Investor Summit" and the "D. Boral Capital Global Conference" in New York, engaging in one-on-one meetings with interested investors. The company focuses on developing innovative intranasal products, including NS002, an intranasal epinephrine product for anaphylaxis.

feed.title: F/m美國國庫30年期債券ETF-UTHY-ETF淨值表格
feed.summary: This article provides the net asset value (NAV) and market price for the F/m U.S. Treasury 30 Year Bond ETF (UTHY) as of April 22nd. It details the daily net asset values and market prices for the ETF over the past 30 days, along with general information about the ETF. The piece also includes important disclaimers regarding performance calculations, net asset value fluctuations, sales fees, and the informational nature of the data provided.

feed.title: Outset Medical (OM) price target decreased by 14.29% to 9.18
feed.summary: This article states that Outset Medical's (OM) price target has been decreased by 14.29% to 9.18. No further details are provided regarding the reasons for this change or the involved analysts.

feed.title: Organon (NYSE:OGN) Misses Q1 CY2026 Revenue Estimates
feed.summary: Organon (NYSE:OGN) reported a miss on Wall Street's revenue and earnings expectations for Q1 CY2026, with sales declining 3.5% year-on-year to $1.46 billion and adjusted EPS coming in 16.8% below consensus at $0.71. The company has shown a struggle with consistent revenue growth and decreasing profitability over the past several years. Analysts anticipate revenue to remain flat and full-year EPS to grow marginally in the next 12 months, highlighting ongoing challenges for the pharmaceutical firm.

feed.title: Humana (NYSE:HUM) Stock Price Expected to Rise, Cantor Fitzgerald Analyst Says
feed.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald raised its price target for Humana (NYSE:HUM) stock to $264, suggesting a 12.18% upside, despite the company's Q1 earnings beat and strong membership growth, as management warned of lower Medicare Advantage Star ratings and payment headwinds. Other analysts have varied ratings, with the consensus being a "Hold" at a target of $243.17. Insider Sanjay K. Shetty recently purchased 810 shares, and institutional investors own a significant portion of the company's stock.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Lowers Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) Price Target to $100.00
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial has reduced its price target for Builders FirstSource (NYSE:BLDR) to $100.00 from $140.00, citing a potential upside of 27.73%. This adjustment follows the company's Q1 EPS miss, despite a revenue beat, and management's warning of softer demand. Builders FirstSource's board has authorized a $500 million share buyback, and the stock currently holds a "Hold" consensus rating with an average target price of $106.31 among analysts.

feed.title: 10 Exceptional Stocks With Double-Digit Dividend Raises
feed.summary: This article identifies a rare group of 10 dividend-paying stocks that have consistently achieved double-digit dividend growth for five consecutive years and passed rigorous checks. David Harrell of Morningstar DividendInvestor newsletter discusses the qualifications for this list, including three newcomers for 2026, and highlights five of these stocks that Morningstar analysts consider undervalued. The piece also looks ahead to potential dividend growers for 2027, noting some candidates poised to maintain their status and one likely to slip.

feed.title: KeyCorp Increases Roku (NASDAQ:ROKU) Price Target to $150.00
feed.summary: KeyCorp has raised its price target for Roku (NASDAQ:ROKU) to $150 from $140, maintaining an "overweight" rating and suggesting a nearly 29% upside. This comes after Roku surpassed Q1 estimates with $0.57 EPS and $1.25 billion in revenue, leading management to increase its annual platform revenue outlook due to strong ad demand and subscriber growth. Despite positive momentum, the company faces high valuation and execution risks, as indicated by its high P/E ratio and recent insider share sales.

feed.title: UBS Adjusts Price Target on L3Harris Technologies to $330 From $362, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: UBS has adjusted its price target for L3Harris Technologies (LHX) to $330, down from $362, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This update comes as L3Harris lifted its 2026 profit forecast and reported a first-quarter beat for 2026, driven by strong weapons demand. The company also confidentially filed for an initial public offering of its missile unit.

feed.title: Deere & Company Elects Brent Norwood as Chief Financial Officer
feed.summary: Deere & Company has appointed Brent Norwood as its new senior vice president and chief financial officer, effective May 1, 2026. Norwood brings over 20 years of experience within Deere and the financial sector, having previously served as VP and finance director for the Construction and Forestry division. His appointment is strategic as Deere navigates evolving agricultural equipment demand, invests in automation, and manages broader macroeconomic pressures.

feed.title: Altria to Host Webcast of 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders
feed.summary: Altria Group, Inc. (NYSE: MO) will be hosting a live audio webcast of its 2026 Annual Meeting of Shareholders on Thursday, May 14, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The meeting will be virtual, allowing shareholders to vote and submit questions, with details for participation available on Altria's website. The company also encourages shareholders to review various business, financial, and corporate responsibility resources prior to the meeting.

feed.title: WW Grainger Shareholders Approve Directors, Auditor and Pay
feed.summary: At its April 29, 2026 annual meeting, W.W. Grainger (GWW) shareholders re-elected all management-nominated directors, including CEO D.G. Macpherson, ratified Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor, and approved the executive compensation plan. These decisions indicate strong shareholder confidence in the company's governance and leadership. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates GWW as an "Outperform" due to its financial quality and technical momentum, even with higher valuation and some near-term pressures.

feed.title: RBC Trims Price Target on Smurfit Westrock to $53 From $54, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has adjusted its price target for Smurfit Westrock (SW) shares, lowering it to $53 from the previous $54, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This update comes shortly after similar adjustments by Truist Securities following Smurfit Westrock's Q1 earnings results, amidst other news regarding the company's financial performance and operational agreements.

feed.title: Jane Fraser Turned Citigroup Inside Out. Now Comes the Hard Part.
feed.summary: Jane Fraser, CEO of Citigroup, is leading the bank through its 13th restructuring in an effort to change its long-standing reputation as a banking sector laggard. This exclusive report from Barron's details the challenges and prospects of this major overhaul.

feed.title: RBC Raises Price Target on ResMed to $321 From $314, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has increased its price target for ResMed (RMD) to $321 from $314, while reaffirming an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analysts also modifying their price targets for ResMed, some upward and some downward, as the company reported higher fiscal Q3 non-GAAP earnings and revenue. ResMed specializes in medical devices and software for respiratory disorders, with a significant presence in the United States.

feed.title: Is Analog Devices (ADI) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Its Recent Share Price Surge
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) has seen significant share price appreciation, with returns of 110.8% over 1 year and 182.1% over 5 years. Despite this surge, a Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is overvalued by 115.7% at $402 per share, with an estimated intrinsic value of $186.52. The article explores both bullish and bearish narratives for ADI, with fair values ranging from US$450 to US$379.64, depending on assumptions regarding growth drivers like AI and automotive demand.

feed.title: NAPCO Security earnings in focus as recurring revenue model gains traction
feed.summary: NAPCO Security Technologies Inc. is scheduled to report its fiscal third-quarter results. Analysts are bullish on the stock, with a mean price target of $49.67, driven by the company's annual recurring revenue model and strong demand for its StarLink communicators which replace aging telephone and cellular infrastructure. Investors will be focused on subscriber additions, recurring service revenue growth, and margin sustainability in the upcoming report.

feed.title: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $0.30
feed.summary: LKQ Corporation (NASDAQ:LKQ) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.30 per share, with shareholders of record on May 21 set to be paid on June 4. The company reported quarterly earnings of $0.67 EPS, matching estimates, and revenue of $3.47 billion, exceeding analyst expectations. With a payout ratio of approximately 31.3%, the dividend is well-covered by earnings, and analysts anticipate LKQ will post $3.05 EPS for the current year.

feed.title: Eastman Chemical Q1 2026 slides: sequential gains amid geopolitical headwinds
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical (NYSE:EMN) reported Q1 2026 results, navigating geopolitical disruptions with sequential improvements despite year-over-year declines in some areas. The company's U.S.-based manufacturing, strategic price increases, and circular economy initiatives positioned it for market share gains. Eastman provided Q2 adjusted EPS guidance of $1.70 to $1.90 and a full-year forecast exceeding $6.00, above analyst consensus.

feed.title: Salesforce Inc Stock (CRM) Opened Up by 5.02% on May 1: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Salesforce Inc (CRM) stock rose by 5.02% due to advancements in its AI offerings, including the launch of Agentforce Operations for back-office automation and "Headless 360" for developer flexibility. The company also updated its financial reporting structure for fiscal year 2027 to categorize revenue into "Agentforce Apps" and "Data 360, Platform & Other," providing greater transparency into its AI products. These strategic moves, combined with strong financial performance and favorable analyst ratings, fueled investor optimism.

feed.title: Amgen Inc Stock (AMGN) Opened Down by 4.69% on May 1: A Full Analysis
feed.summary: Amgen Inc (AMGN) stock opened down by 4.69% despite beating first-quarter 2026 earnings and revenue estimates. The decline was primarily driven by the FDA's proposed withdrawal of the autoimmune drug Tavneos, a 34% drop in Prolia sales due to patent expiration, and a newly disclosed IRS risk. These negative factors overshadowed strong performance in other drugs and positive pipeline updates, leading to investor concern.

feed.title: Palantir Technologies Inc Stock (PLTR) Opened Up by 4.31% on May 1: Drivers Behind the Movement
feed.summary: Palantir Technologies Inc (PLTR) saw its stock open up by 4.31% on May 1, driven by strong positive sentiment ahead of its Q1 2026 earnings report and favorable analyst ratings. The company also announced a new multi-year AI partnership with Cleveland Cliffs, expanding its commercial footprint. Despite a technical sell signal, these factors contributed to increased investor confidence and market outperformance.

feed.title: ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) Plans Quarterly Dividend of $0.60
feed.summary: ResMed Inc. (NYSE:RMD) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.60 per share, payable on June 18th to shareholders of record by May 14th, marking 13 consecutive years of dividend increases. The company exceeded earnings and revenue expectations for the last quarter, reporting $2.86 EPS and $1.43 billion in revenue, with analysts anticipating continued strong earnings to support future dividends. ResMed's dividend payout ratio is currently 22.7%, projected to decrease to 19.8% next year.

feed.title: All Smurfit Westrock board nominees win at 2026 shareholder vote
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock plc announced that all director nominees and other resolutions recommended by the company's Board of Directors were approved by shareholders at its 2026 annual general meeting. The company filed a Form 8-K with the U.S. SEC to report these results, which are available on the SEC's website and the company's investor relations page. Additionally, copies of the resolutions passed will be submitted to the National Storage Mechanism.

feed.title: Jacobs Solutions Inc. Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.36 (NYSE:J)
feed.summary: Jacobs Solutions Inc. declared a quarterly dividend of $0.36 per share, payable on June 19th to shareholders of record on May 22nd. This implies an annual dividend of $1.44 and a yield of 1.1%, representing the fourth consecutive year the company has raised its dividend. The dividend is well-covered by earnings, with a payout ratio of 20.9% and an expected future payout ratio of 17.8%.

feed.title: Federal Realty Investment Trust stock hits 52-week high at 113.13 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) stock has climbed to a 52-week high of $113.13, marking a 21.76% total return over the past year. The real estate investment trust, valued at $9.82 billion, currently offers a 4.08% dividend yield and has consistently paid dividends for 54 years. Recent strong financial results, including exceeding Q4 2025 earnings and revenue expectations, and strategic acquisitions like the Congressional North Shopping Center, underscore the company's robust performance despite appearing overvalued by some metrics.

feed.title: Free cash flow per share of Anbio Biotechnology Class A – FWB:N3B
feed.summary: The article presents information related to the free cash flow per share for Anbio Biotechnology Class A, traded on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under the symbol N3B. It appears to be a financial data snippet from TradingView, indicating the period, value, and change in free cash flow per share. The content is primarily a data placeholder within a financial platform's interface.

feed.title: MYR Group Inc. to Attend KeyBanc Industrials & Basic Materials Conference in May
feed.summary: MYR Group Inc. (NASDAQ: MYRG) announced its participation in the upcoming KeyBanc Industrials & Basic Materials Conference. The conference is scheduled to take place on Tuesday, May 31, 2026, marking a significant event for the electrical infrastructure construction company. Investors and interested parties can find more details about MYR Group on its official website.

feed.title: Northeast Bank Joins Rank Of Stocks With 95-Plus Composite Rating
feed.summary: Northeast Bank (NASDAQ: NBN) has achieved a Composite Rating of 96, placing it among the top growth stocks. This strong rating is driven by impressive growth in earnings and sales, and a leading position in its industry group. The stock is currently consolidating below a 35.03 buy point.

feed.title: Textron to Separate its Automotive Equipment, Specialized Vehicles Business
feed.summary: Textron announced its intention to separate its Industrial segment, which includes Kautex and Textron Specialized Vehicles, from its core aerospace and defense businesses. This strategic move aims to create a pure-play aerospace and defense company, "New Textron," and grant the Industrial segment independence to pursue its own growth strategies. The separation is expected to be completed within 12 to 18 months, unlocking long-term value for all stakeholders.

feed.title: BofA Securities Maintains Aflac Inc(AFL.US) With Buy Rating
feed.summary: BofA Securities has reiterated its Buy rating on Aflac Inc (AFL.US). The firm maintains a positive outlook for the insurance company. This continued endorsement suggests confidence in Aflac's future performance.

feed.title: Gartner Survey Finds Technology Integration and Talent Perceived as Key Roadblocks to Scaling AI in Supply Chain
feed.summary: A new Gartner survey reveals that Chief Supply Chain Officers (CSCOs) face significant challenges in integrating AI with legacy systems (56%) and a lack of internal expertise (50%) when trying to scale AI in supply chains. The survey, involving 140 senior supply chain leaders, indicates that the main hurdle to AI adoption is not the technology itself, but the existing legacy environments. Gartner suggests that creating AI-native supply chains requires reimagining operating models, redesigning organizational structures for AI-centric roles, and strategically evolving technology layers.

feed.title: The Bank of N.T. Butterfield & Son Limited Beat Analyst Estimates: See What The Consensus Is Forecasting For This Year
feed.summary: The Bank of N.T. Butterfield & Son Limited (NYSE: NTB) recently reported strong quarterly results, with revenues exceeding analyst expectations by 4.0% and EPS surpassing estimates by 9.3%. Following these results, analysts have raised their revenue and EPS forecasts for 2026, leading to a 13% increase in the price target to US$57.33 per share, despite acknowledging that the company's growth rate is projected to be slower than the broader industry.

feed.title: Transcript: Cboe Global Markets Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets reported record Q1 2026 net revenue of $729 million and adjusted diluted EPS of $3.70, showing significant year-over-year growth. The company announced strategic realignment actions, including asset sales and workforce reduction, to optimize operations and focus on core businesses and emerging opportunities like prediction markets and tokenization. Cboe also provided updated 2026 guidance, projecting low double-digit to mid-teens organic net revenue growth and a 12-14% reduction in adjusted operating expenses.

feed.title: PAVmed (PAVM) 2026 proxy: ESPP share increase, director elections and auditor vote
feed.summary: PAVmed Inc. (PAVM) has released details for its 2026 virtual annual stockholder meeting on June 24, 2026. Key agenda items include the re-election of two Class A directors (Ronald M. Sparks and Timothy Baxter), approval of amendments to the Employee Stock Purchase Plan (ESPP) to increase available shares and the annual "evergreen" limit, and ratification of CBIZ CPAs P.C. as the independent auditor. The ESPP proposal seeks to raise available shares to 215,774 and increase the annual evergreen limit to 500,000 shares through 2031 to support employee ownership and compensation strategy.

feed.title: RBC Cuts Price Target on Builders FirstSource to $107 From $110, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC has lowered its price target for Builders FirstSource (BLDR) to $107 from $110, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst a series of other analyst price target cuts for the company, indicating a potential reevaluation of its future performance by financial institutions.

feed.title: Diamondback Energy’s Endeavor Deal Reshapes Exposure To Post OPEC Oil Volatility
feed.summary: Diamondback Energy's (FANG) recent Endeavor merger has increased its presence in the Midland Basin, making it a key beneficiary of the UAE's exit from OPEC and subsequent oil market volatility. This strategic move enhances Diamondback's exposure to rising crude prices due to its low-cost operating profile and expanded acreage, directly linking its financial performance more closely to commodity price swings. Investors should monitor how the company manages cash flow, integration progress, and cost efficiency in this new, more volatile market landscape.

feed.title: Inside Boston Scientific's $15 billion offer for Alameda's largest employer
feed.summary: Boston Scientific has made a $15 billion offer to acquire Penumbra, Alameda's largest employer. The deal comes less than three months after a Boston Scientific executive first approached Penumbra's co-founders about a potential partnership, highlighting a swift negotiation process. This acquisition is poised to significantly impact the Bay Area's biotech and healthcare sectors.

feed.title: East LA Resident Who Defrauded Apple Inc. to Be Sentenced
feed.summary: An East Los Angeles resident, Junwei Jiang, is scheduled for sentencing after pleading guilty to participating in a scheme to defraud Apple Inc. Jiang and other co-conspirators imported counterfeit iPhones and iPads from China, exchanged them for genuine devices at Apple stores across Southern California, and then resold the authentic products for profit, causing Apple at least $16.2 million in losses. Three other defendants also pleaded guilty, with one already sentenced to two years in prison.

feed.title: NatWest CEO Says Customer Activity Healthy in Face of Iran War
feed.summary: NatWest CEO Paul Thwaite reported healthy customer activity, with strong savings and borrowing contributing to a first-quarter profit of £2 billion. This financial stability comes despite global tensions, such as the conflict involving Iran. The bank's performance suggests resilience in its customer base.

feed.title: Blackstone Extends Reach Into Life Sciences And AI Data Infrastructure
feed.summary: Blackstone (NYSE:BX) has expanded its investment focus into new sectors by committing up to US$400 million to Teva's autoimmune drug program and arranging a US$2 billion financing package for QTS data centers to support AI capacity. These moves diversify Blackstone's earnings beyond its traditional real estate, private equity, and credit strategies, aligning with long-term trends in healthcare and data usage. While these investments offer new growth drivers, investors should also consider the company's valuation, high debt levels, and dividend coverage.

feed.title: UBS Group Boosts Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) Price Target to $216.00
feed.summary: UBS Group has increased its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) to $216.00, up from $202.00, while maintaining a "neutral" rating. This new target suggests a modest 1.68% upside from the previous closing price. The company recently surpassed Q1 earnings estimates with EPS of $1.14 and revenue of $1.33 billion, though revenue was down 2.9% year-over-year.

feed.title: Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) Price Target Raised to $232.00 at Stifel Nicolaus
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus has raised its price target for Old Dominion Freight Line (NASDAQ:ODFL) to $232.00, suggesting a potential upside of 9.21% from its current price, following the company's beat on quarterly EPS and revenue estimates. Despite a slight revenue decline year-over-year, the company maintained a strong ROE and net margin. However, insider transactions indicate significant selling activity by key executives over the past three months.

feed.title: Moderna Reports Q1 2026 Results: Full Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Moderna reported Q1 2026 revenue of $400 million, a significant increase year-over-year, largely due to a strategic partnership with the UK government, and reiterated its expectation of up to 10% revenue growth for 2026. Despite a GAAP net loss of $1.3 billion primarily from a litigation settlement, the company maintained a strong balance sheet with $7.5 billion in cash and investments. Key developments include the EU approval of a flu-COVID combo vaccine and the initiation of a Phase 3 trial for Intismiran in non-small cell lung cancer, with a strategic focus on expanding its commercial portfolio and leveraging AI and robotics.

feed.title: Baird Adjusts Labcorp Price Target to $334 From $332
feed.summary: Baird has increased its price target for Labcorp Holdings Inc. (LH) to $334 from the previous $332. This adjustment reflects an updated outlook from the financial analysis firm on the company's valuation. The report was published on May 1, 2026, at 09:20 am EDT.

feed.title: Two New York investor events will feature Nasus Pharma CFO Eyal Rubin
feed.summary: Nasus Pharma (NYSE: NSRX) announced that its CFO, Eyal Rubin, will participate in two investor conferences in New York in early May 2026. He will hold one-on-one meetings at the Market Movers Investor Summit on May 5th and the D. Boral Capital Global Conference on May 7th. Interested investors are encouraged to contact the sponsoring institutions to request meetings with the company.

feed.title: Apple just posted $111 billion in revenue. Now its CFO and incoming CEO are teaming up
feed.summary: Incoming Apple CEO John Ternus and CFO Kevan Parekh are committed to continuing the financial discipline established by Tim Cook. Apple reported a record March quarter with $111.2 billion in revenue, exceeding analyst estimates, driven by strong iPhone sales and growth in its Services segment. Ternus emphasized a focus on product innovation, echoing outgoing CEO Tim Cook's advice.

feed.title: W.W. Grainger (GWW) investors re-elect board and approve 2026 pay and auditor
feed.summary: W.W. Grainger, Inc. shareholders re-elected all management nominees to the board of directors and approved the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor for the year ending December 31, 2026, during their annual meeting on April 29, 2026. Additionally, a non-binding advisory proposal approving the compensation for the Company’s Named Executive Officers passed with significant shareholder support. A total of 47,329,985 shares were eligible to vote, with 41,240,433 shares represented at the meeting.

feed.title: Is Dollar General’s (DG) New Retail Media Push Quietly Redefining Its Competitive Moat?
feed.summary: Dollar General has partnered with Kevel and The Trade Desk to create a unified retail media solution, integrating onsite inventory with offsite activation for advertisers. This initiative is expected to enhance Dollar General's digital and advertising capabilities, potentially supporting its near-term financial performance and deepening the DG Media Network. While it aligns with the company's long-term digital goals, its impact is secondary to core operational efforts like store remodels and new store openings.

feed.title: Lululemon, Apple, Best Buy CEOs among April’s retail C-suite moves
feed.summary: This article details significant C-suite changes in the retail sector during April, highlighting new CEO appointments at Lululemon, Apple (effective September 1), and Best Buy (effective October 31). Other notable moves include leadership changes at Sol de Janeiro, Conagra, Dolce & Gabbana, and Ganni, as well as shifts at Nordstrom, Bath & Body Works, Nike, and Hershey's. The report emphasizes the ongoing executive reshuffling within major retail and consumer brands.
